examples: Objective To study the effects of hyperthermal, hunger and hypoxia on hemorheology.
Series of long decay afterglow powders of strontium aluminum oxide system activated by Eu2 + were prepared by hyperthermal sintering techniques.
Methods:We perfused hyperthermal solution and anti-tumor drugs by means of percutaneous punctured canal to treat malignant ascites in 22 patients.
